text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder collapses during training. I rush her
to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I apologize for that embarrassing display.
choice_data_list: Were you not feeling well this morning?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I wasn't. But I thought I could push through it
for a single training session.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect this... Training will have to be put
on hold for the foreseeable future, won't it?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer... please see to your work.
choice_data_list: I'll be here until you're back on your feet.
Once you're rested, we can get right back to it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You're really not going to leave, are you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes... Yes, I suppose you're right.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't have to see me in such a miserable
state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend time in the infirmary with a depressed
Grass Wonder until she feels better.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: All right. Thank you for your concern.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder seemed a little on edge, so I give
her some time alone to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to be just sitting here... Why did
this have to happen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear how upset she is, even from the other side
of the infirmary's door.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me. We seem to be so in sync that I
couldn't help but laugh.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much. I'll commit myself to recovery
and be back to full strength in no time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's recovery takes a while. But once
she's back on her feet, she remains true to her
word and makes up for lost time.
